[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

1 100100100 3
2 111110101 7
3 111111011 8
4 111110010 6
5 110100100 4
6 111000100 4
7 010101111 6
